my version

I would say that this kind of trend give a negative development of our children.

replies.msg: sorry講得唔清楚, 要將問題轉做introdution, 表達埋自己意見係positive 定negative

Nowadays, computer gaming has been a fad among all youngsters. This might be associated with the advancements in technologies which make both computers and gaming more accessible and ubiquitous. Personally, excessive gaming  poses adverse effects on children in many ways but at the same time, moderate amount of gaming could be beneficial.

I completely disagree with this opinion and think that all human being’s privacy including celebrities should be well protected
